D1 Optics L3 Apply Reference

Snell's Law Refractometer

drag the incident ray and watch n₁ sin θ₁ = n₂ sin θ₂ rebalance in real time

Light bends at an interface because its phase velocity changes between media of different refractive index.

Drag the incident angle slider to tilt the laser. Slide the lower-medium index to see the refracted ray bend toward or away from the normal. Past the critical angle, only total internal reflection remains.

θ₂
—
Critical angle
—
state
refracting
